prediction.reasoning: Based on SBUX's historical volatility of approximately 25-30% annually (roughly 1.6-1.9% daily), I applied a 6-day forecast assuming random walk with drift. The slight positive drift reflects the stock's long-term upward trend. Daily volatility of ~1.7% compounds over 6 days to ~4.2% standard deviation. Confidence intervals are constructed using normal distribution assumptions around the point estimate.
